column1: Scientist to Go- Dr. Adrienne Kovach
column20: Join Adrienne as she discusses her research on cottontail conservation in New England as well as marsh and shrub land birds!
column21:
The Scientist To Go program allows for students to meet with a wide range of scientists and to learn a little bit more about what they do. It is intended for grades 5-8, but learners of all ages are welcome to attend. Scientist To Go presentations can highlight how the scientist ended up where they are today, what they are researching, and/or anything else that they want to highlight about their scientific career.

We hope these presentations will expose students to a diverse group of scientists and science career paths, including both formal and informal science, and let them see science in ways that they may not get to do in a traditional classroom setting.
column30: Animals, Birds, Education, Nature and Outdoors, Ecology and Environment
